burst_traffic.name: Burst Traffic — 10 agents send 100 messages simultaneously
burst_traffic.notes: 10 agents each send 100 messages to all other agents simultaneously. Tests thundering herd scenario.

large_message_1mb.name: Large Message — 1MB
large_message_1mb.verdict: Message delivered without timeout or OOM
large_message_1mb.notes: 1MB message sent and echoed. Tests frame encoding/decoding with large payloads.

many_streams_100.name: Many Streams — 100 concurrent streams
many_streams_100.notes: 100 concurrent QUIC streams on a single connection. Tests stream multiplexing.

connection_churn_20.name: Connection Churn — 20 connect/disconnect cycles
connection_churn_20.notes: 20 cycles of connect, send 1 message, disconnect. Tests FD and memory recovery.

dht_100_announce_lookup.name: DHT Under Load — 100 announce + 5 lookups
dht_100_announce_lookup.notes: 100 DHT records announced across 5 capabilities, then all looked up. Tests DHT throughput.

dht_concurrent_access.name: DHT Concurrent Access — 10 concurrent lookups
dht_concurrent_access.notes: 10 concurrent DHT lookups with 50 records. Tests thread safety.

summary.verdict: PASS — Agent survives all stress tests without crash or OOM

verification.target: Agent survives all stress tests without crash or OOM
